state.next-action: The shared auth foundation, the polished backend-backed reader workspace, the repub artifact merge, and the first DB-backed Listen catalog slice are now in place: owner seed, tenant/org seed, long-lived sessions, entitlement/viewer helpers, host-facing login/logout/session routes, reader library/settings/reading-state collections, owner-only workspace settings save, explicit local-EPUB upload, saved-upload shelf cards, continue-reading defaults, planning supplement embedding, committed author annotations folded back into the emitted EPUB artifact, and Payload-backed Listen catalog records filtered through the shared access layer. Next, finish `listen-access-01-02` so private media uses authenticated owner sessions instead of transitional shared-password unlock groups, then define the next Books reader phase explicitly.

agent-id-policy.rule: Optional: register a unique id in STATE.xml before claiming tasks if you use CLI task-update.
